name: cableguardvpnnftcminter

scripts.build: npm run build:contract && npm run build:web
scripts.test: npm run build:contract && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.postinstall: cd frontend && npm install && cd .. && cd integration-tests && npm install && cd .. && cd contract && npm install

description: Create Wireguard compatible sets of NFTs with all the configuration and subscription information necessary to set up VPN connections.
